ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Mains, via Zoom, for Elias Suakjian, Executor.

The court advises that it is satisfied as to the efforts to provide notice to Hannah Friedman.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 29, 2018 is admitted to probate. The Court waives notice to Milo Hammer for this hearing only. Elias Suakjian is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
